title: FoOrders
description: An Order plugin for Minecraft. Players can order items and deliver them.
body:
![Cover Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e6b2dc297e65c6dc7bd20b5095951e5eac12c4e.png)
**FoOrders lets your players create and fulfill item orders in-game, making your server economy feel alive and interactive.**

FoOrders brings structured trading to your server without the hassle. Perfect for survival and/or economy servers looking to level up player interactions.

![Order Area, Shows all Orders.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e99b0b03414f28f5c66e940045580f62041d7c6.png)

## Features:
- Create orders for any item – Players can request items they need and set a price for delivery.

![Create orders easily. Set the item, amount and price!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61ac79c257a7610cb212b1ab1290dad65785e8fd.png)
- Configurable creation tax - Add a percentage-based upfront tax that players see before confirming an order.
- Deliver items for money – Players can fulfill orders to earn money via Vault integration. You can also put in shulkers. Non ordered items and shulkers will automatically be returned.

![Deliver GUI. Shulkers work too! You'll get the shulker back with the ordered item taken out.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b4e3eee4348572feb113e90ae2c86012883e047.png)
- Order management – Cancel orders if needed. Delivered items can be collected directly or stored in shulkers for easy delivery.

![Collect or Cancel orders. No refunds for already delivered items tho!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac02cb99db2743c94d077f5ef7cb9fba52042153.png)

![Claiming Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c111ec7848a696a3c17772685194b0e47ba4fb60.png)
- Search, filter, and sort – Quickly find orders with flexible search options and sorting features.
![Sort & Filter Items by their Type And Price](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee957c8932c89c6b034b2fa37500988ec7b71fc1.png)
- Regular /orders [search] command for players
- Clean, intuitive interface – Designed to be simple to use and look good in-game.
- Can now add custom items
- Discord webhook (for checking for suspicious activity)
- History tab (optional, admins can also check any player's history (also optional))
- Admin cancelation of other players (optional, for if an item gets blacklisted after it's already been ordered)
- Blacklist certain items and/or names


## Permissions:
- foorders.admin – Access admin commands (/ordersadmin) (and ability to cancel any player's order and add custom items)
- foorders.maxorders.<number> - Amount of orders that player can set, overrides the default max order in config
- foorders.use - Access to /orders (default set to true for players)

## Dependencies:
- Vault _(for economy integration)_

## Commands
- /orders [<search>]
- /ordersadmin <reload|version|editor|history> [player] (editor opens custom items menu)
